CustomField.formula: IF( Min_Production_Stage_Number__c = 1, 'In Verification', IF(Min_Production_Stage_Number__c = 2, 'In Production', IF(Min_Production_Stage_Number__c = 3, 'Manufactured', IF(Min_Production_Stage_Number__c = 4, 'Ready to Dispatch', IF(Min_Production_Stage_Number__c = 5, 'Dispatched', 'Nil' ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Min Production Stage Line Item
